strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff, not Director-level Principal IC
Lacks advanced degree and large-scale cloud architecture track record

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and recognized AI products
Seniority gap vs Director-level Principal IC
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The candidate has solid full-stack craftsmanship and ~14 years of varied engineering experience, including recent AI-agent tooling work, but the role demands a Director-level Principal IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud strategy influence. The resume shows no large-scale AI platform leadership, no advanced degree, and seniority levels below Principal. Strong engineer, but a mismatch for this specific strategic AI principal role.
